---
title: "Use-case A — Alzheimer's disease"
subtitle: "Session 4a · Parameter exploration and model optimization"
jupyter: python3
---

## Goals

- TODO: integrate biomedical data (e.g. amyloid / tau PET) into a TVB model
- TODO: run a mechanistic simulation of disease progression
- TODO: compare healthy vs. patient-specific dynamics

## Setup

```{python}
# TODO: imports
```

## Load patient data

```{python}
# TODO: connectome + per-region biomarker maps
```

## Map biomarkers onto model parameters

```{python}
# TODO: parameterise a region-specific local model
```

## Simulate and compare

```{python}
# TODO: run healthy + patient simulations, contrast outputs
```

## Exercises

- TODO: which biomarker has the strongest effect on global dynamics?
- TODO: how robust is the result to the chosen mapping?
